scripts.build: npm run build -w @openclaude-studio/shared && npm run build -w openclaude-studio && npm run build -w @openclaude-studio/web
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w openclaude-studio" "npm run dev -w @openclaude-studio/web"
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @openclaude-studio/shared && npm run lint -w openclaude-studio && npm run lint -w @openclaude-studio/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w openclaude-studio && npm run test -w @openclaude-studio/web
